title: Raindrop Trout
description: A tangy and juicy monsoon Malaysian dish featuring trout that is cooked to be raw-friendly.
instructions: Combine lemon juice, soy sauce, oyster sauce, minced garlic, scallions, fresh ginger, red pepper flakes, fish sauce, sesame oil, and sugar in a bowl.
Place trout fillets in a shallow dish and pour the marinade mixture over them. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or overnight for better flavor development.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and add enough sesame oil to coat the bottom of the pan. When hot, carefully place the trout fillets in the pan, skin-side down.
Cook until golden brown on both sides and just cooked through, about 5-6 minutes per side. Remove from heat and let rest for a minute before serving.
